name: =?utf-8?Q?M=C5=A9thoni_Wambu_Kraal=2C_EMILY=27s_List?=
subject: 6 months. 18 trainings. Thousands of women.
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c65a8/24c69fd9/b6a2d5eb/1898b3fa/3405079631/VEsH/ "http://emilyslist.org/run-to-win?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQENE811N_digital_email_20170807_RtWTrainings_inact&source=WQENE811N_digital_email_20170807_RtWTrainings_inact")
---

Peter,

Mark your calendar: Run to Win is coming to you!

We've rolled out our most extensive training schedule ever: We're heading to 18 cities in the next six months -- and we're doing online trainings for the first time ever!

All of the Run to Win 101 trainings are for women who want to learn more about running for office. You don't need to be planning a run to attend, just an interest in learning the basics of being a candidate for state and local office.

**[Check out the list of cities we'll be in, and sign up to get invites for future trainings.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c65a8/24c69fd9/b6a2d5eb/1898b3fb/3405079631/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20170503_website_TrainingInterest?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Check+out+the+list+of+cities+well+be+in+&utm_campaign=WQENE811N_digital_email_20170807_RtWTrainings_inact&source=WQENE811N_digital_email_20170807_RtWTrainings_inact")**
[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c65a8/24c69fd9/b6a2d5eb/1898b3f4/3405079631/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20170503_website_TrainingInterest?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=WQENE811N_digital_email_20170807_RtWTrainings_inact&source=WQENE811N_digital_email_20170807_RtWTrainings_inact")
**Don't see a training near you? We're putting together a series of online trainings, too. Sign up to make sure you receive invites:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Training-Signup](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c65a8/24c69fd9/b6a2d5eb/1898b3f5/3405079631/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20170503_website_TrainingInterest?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgTrainingSignup&utm_campaign=WQENE811N_digital_email_20170807_RtWTrainings_inact&source=WQENE811N_digital_email_20170807_RtWTrainings_inact")**

Hope to see you soon,

Mũthoni Wambu Kraal
Vice President of National Outreach and Training, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c65a8/24c69fd9/b6a2d5eb/1898b3f6/3405079631/VEsD/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=WQENE811N_digital_email_20170807_RtWTrainings_inact&source=WQENE811N_digital_email_20170807_RtWTrainings_inact")

| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c65a8/24c69fd9/b6a2d5eb/1898b3f7/3405079631/VEsA/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQENE811N_digital_email_20170807_RtWTrainings_inact&source=WQENE811N_digital_email_20170807_RtWTrainings_inact")
---
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c65a8/24c69fd9/b6a2d5eb/1898b3f0/3405079631/VEsB/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WQENE811N_digital_email_20170807_RtWTrainings_inact&source=WQENE811N_digital_email_20170807_RtWTrainings_inact") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c65a8/24c69fd9/b6a2d5eb/1898b3f1/3405079631/VEsO/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=WQENE811N_digital_email_20170807_RtWTrainings_inact&source=WQENE811N_digital_email_20170807_RtWTrainings_inact"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c65a8/24c69fd9/b6a2d5eb/1898b3f2/3405079631/VEsP/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=WQENE811N_digital_email_20170807_RtWTrainings_inact&source=WQENE811N_digital_email_20170807_RtWTrainings_inact"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

name: Ronna McDaniel
subject: Americans know best
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
I’m not interested in what politicians think. |
---
| | |

Peter,

When President Trump asked me to take over the Republican National Committee last year, I knew that we had a big job ahead of us to drain the DC swamp.

And ever since, I've been fighting tirelessly alongside the President for his America First agenda.

**But we 're always trying to ensure that our message is clear, and our Party is fighting for the needs of REAL Americans.** That's why I put together this survey to get _**your**_ feedback on what's working and what's not. **[ **Take the 2017 Chairwoman 's Survey **](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=334ab162a5aeb6612b9dd79a346d517f25b68efd07436b90653103415b7e7221a0cf8b57d186ee9f0f36f7d26c90d5a0b5f61a1ed0f0f2d8)**
I believe that Americans know what's good for them and their families better than the self-serving politicians in the DC bubble.

_That 's why I'm going to you directly to make sure that we are focusing on exactly the issues that matter to you most._**[But we need as many Americans as possible to participate in the survey to make it count.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=334ab162a5aeb661c433bc7485022db604dc4e7d3b380fe15e9083013ccd8a566db415c7504e1449f3f7291cdff4ce33b3330d4e8b583d31)**

Don't miss this critical opportunity to give us your thoughts.

**This is our future, Peter, and I want to fight for you, for President Trump, and for our beloved country.**

**[As we make critical decisions for America going forward, please take a moment to make your voice heard by taking the 2017 Chairwoman's Survey.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=334ab162a5aeb661723c945cb1d867ab133776b1a798f53475b1506c5f8e681a54f61c8f2b4950a38412b131784e33538fe12b9a59f1981e)**

Thank you, God bless, and MAGA,

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=334ab162a5aeb661fd3ae4d5ea17a1da1232e0c98f2cb872359dd6892d8b27e5dbb494dc83e01cfbb15924aa7767227e3b2ccdcea447f0ef)
Ronna McDaniel
Chairwoman, Republican National Committee
**[**Take the 2017 Chairwoman 's Survey **](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=334ab162a5aeb6612b5a304198f2068edc5648efe78d12950fd4453d66b06575867e6e7014beb858142276f074eb5c6b1bc2602ef7b2293f)**
---

Paid for by the Republican National Committee
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
[www.GOP.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=32148ac6426f6bccc63c02f034346d8d39c25655d011074ba303b66ce2e56894800d82067969725d5127fb977e5d5e8521aafd270399840d) You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com
Republican National Committee (RNC), 310 1st St SE Washington, DC, 20003-1885, US

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Republican Party and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=32148ac6426f6bcc7dcedcf248082d0e25415a3a848ef3239624ac7198bea7c84d262d31a8c6db63a7a5bb6e1002e7118fcc1e4aca875ff9) | [Unsubscribe](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/unsub_center.aspx?qs=2d1444c0c3dd22ab4f9b68a5d424590141272149bf865096c64c0ea6a47e03490a69b0a4b4d19b97d582db894e9c11e673bb893f8e8b3f37) | [Update Profile](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=2d1444c0c3dd22ab291494658eff68202d789f94509d4846425e7870b94ee8243876bddd154e227facd0e8c6c8a7cf37e816f5cd9740f2fd)
---

name: The White House
subject: Meet the Cabinet: Secretary Tom Price
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bbfa6467901e7bf3191f53a04e395e423c7db7eda94641744670a15ad08f112655bd29c1aeeeb34ef1b7b2347063283bc3c145a7bd83a1ea

Welcome to 1600 Daily's Meet the Cabinet series, where we will feature content from Secretaries and their departments.

Meet Secretary Tom Price

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bbfa6467901e7bf3d46cc0d474c626c3cd98077e1f3ae6888bbf46064de21b492247528205d65740c18382ea5928387222ead97a86b4d718

-------------

The Herald-Whig: HHS Secretary Meets with Local Officials on Opioid Epidemic

Secretary Price and the Trump Administration understand that it is state and local policymakers, advocates, first responders, treatment centers, faith-based organizations, good neighbors, and many more who have responded to help their communities in this time of great need. With this in mind, Secretary Price participated in a listening session with representatives from these groups to learn about how the federal government can best support local initiatives and heard what is working and what is not.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bbfa6467901e7bf3467b80e2c4d79c1501811abb50e23c1de7da95188a672349584097db89ab3dbe08e4f32192da1a648640291b59a11717
Read more

The FDA's Bold New Initiative

The Washington Post editorial board writes that the FDA's new public health initiative "may be one of the most important public-health initiatives of this century." The initiative is a long-term strategy to combat the deathly cycle of tobacco addiction.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bbfa6467901e7bf3ac18442db292bebd0ec71215269538a489a79d46e74f22cd9a287785b8959a9655c0b433b4c55c0cb6a3959400c5b154
Read more

Colorado Gazette: HHS Secretary Touts Program During Colorado Springs Visit

On the heels of the announcement that Los Angeles, California reached a deal to host the 2028 Summer Olympic Games, Health and Human Services Secretary Tom Price, M.D., visited the U.S. Olympic Training Center in Colorado Springs, Colorado. Secretary Price toured the facility and met with leadership and athletes.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bbfa6467901e7bf38773dd3f954d718197433813c423548e103855892e3cbe6abc6fe5b32c3de2afcdd67a109085890afc4e0aed5dc11b61
Read more

Photo of the Day

Secretary Price posing with members of Phoenix Multisport Gym in Colorado Springs, which provides free workouts to people in recovery from substance abuse.

Coming Up This Week

Today, Secretary Price will join President Trump in Bedminster, New Jersey, for a briefing on the opioid crisis. Tomorrow, the Secretary will attend HHS Night at the Nationals Park in Washington D.C.

Follow Secretary Price on

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bbfa6467901e7bf3a7535a307a7ecfce358441efc14ebb7417d1709524245b313e2a82ec4d2d27531069c5303e7fb3eddf8fa8f15e492bce
Twitter ,
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=14aca95b8a3bf080b75bc42a8aba28243d9835c4a4f1dc90b1b18da58c968a5b11e86271b88fba57ebdde330e52d6a7c1f3be67ced28eb55
Facebook , and
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=14aca95b8a3bf0809da279b0905256a87c07042c29765f9e4b07b0b50899842518c754bfbc32f2a7d14cc604a29a9118629aa6dbe8bac63c
Instagram

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=14aca95b8a3bf080c77484aad58c8252e6eda8bbbd472c3c2dfc4256e4c8b58064b8eeacb1d6a47889d606869d0cc2d268432c12c7799143
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=14aca95b8a3bf0800ef760283e6de30bd147f333fef018a24a6454332c1c2b959b7f810bfa6fe6e0b69bbb725c2f24450a424aedbba98ad1
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d45ed22bbce64e210e5d29f7c90d7e62fe94cf691d888aa064b0d06a8c793a053ddc211f6317345e91e906b0aee4a04c63
Unsubscribe

name: Marco Rubio
subject: SURVEY ENCLOSED FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com ONLY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Friend, your opinions matter to me. I appreciate all you did during 2016 to help my campaign and I want to make every effort possible to keep in touch with you, listen to your feedback and address your concerns.
| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/43663632:WYAikVENR:m:1:1328517760:99E17F2B3388C7202A1DACCF258C1829:r)
---
Friend,

With just 5 months remaining in 2017 -- I want to hear from you and what issues/topics you want Congress to tackle before the year's end.

**[There are so many critical issues that need our attention, and I want to know what you think.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/43663632:WYAikVENR:m:1:1328517760:99E17F2B3388C7202A1DACCF258C1829:r)**

So far we have imposed sanctions against corrupt, human rights abusers in Venezuela, added a pro-Constitution Supreme Court Justice, passed a law to better help our veterans, and fought to ensure that children battling cancer have more, promising treatment options.

But obviously, there is much left to be done to turn our nation around. Friend, I need to hear from you. **[Please fill out my 2017 What's to Come Survey right away.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/43663632:WYAikVENR:m:1:1328517760:99E17F2B3388C7202A1DACCF258C1829:r)**

| [** 2017 What's To Come Survey
START NOW >>>>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/43663632:WYAikVENR:m:1:1328517760:99E17F2B3388C7202A1DACCF258C1829:r)
---

I need the advice and support of grassroots activists like you now more than ever. **That's why I am reaching out to find out which issues you believe our Republican majority in the United States Senate should prioritize in the coming months.[Will you please let me know by clicking on the button below? ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/43663632:WYAikVENR:m:1:1328517760:99E17F2B3388C7202A1DACCF258C1829:r) **

[** 2017 What's To Come Survey
START NOW >>>>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/43663632:WYAikVENR:m:1:1328517760:99E17F2B3388C7202A1DACCF258C1829:r)
---

I am proud to be a leading voice for conservative reform, fiscal responsibility and a renewed national commitment to a foreign policy of "peace through strength."

There has been an awful lot of discord in Washington, D.C. since the last election. The liberal Democrats have used every stalling tactic and method of delay they can find to slow confirmation of administration appointees and try to block passage of reform legislation.

Their bitter obstructionism is an embarrassment to the institution of the U.S. Senate and an insult to the American people. The Democrats have put partisanship before the best interests of the country on issue, after issue, after issue.

And the biased media "echo chamber" repeats and amplifies the liberals' bitter attacks and phony misrepresentations of our Republican agenda.

**But I know that the Democrats and their allies in the media don't speak for Main Street Americans like you.**

Friend, the information gathered from my survey will help Republican leaders and me target legislative efforts to ensure that grassroots Republicans are focused and ready to act in support of our actions.

**[So please, take a few minutes to complete the survey right away.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/43663632:WYAikVENR:m:1:1328517760:99E17F2B3388C7202A1DACCF258C1829:r)**

Thank you for your steadfast support and continued commitment to our nation.

Sincerely,

Marco Rubio

[**P.S. Friend, your opinions matter to me. I appreciate all you did during 2016 to help my campaign and I want to make every effort possible to keep in touch with you, listen to your feedback and address your concerns.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/43663632:WYAikVENR:m:1:1328517760:99E17F2B3388C7202A1DACCF258C1829:r)

[** 2017 What's To Come Survey
START NOW >>>>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/43663632:WYAikVENR:m:1:1328517760:99E17F2B3388C7202A1DACCF258C1829:r)
---

| Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 4, 2016.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWYAikVENR). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWYAikVENR)

name: DWS
subject: one Tweet away from a crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Historians are going to have a field day going through President Trump's Twitter archive. **Unfortunately for us, his Tweets have real-time impacts and consequences.** Trump tried to ban transgender individuals from serving in the military, 140 characters at a time. Did he consult with his military advisors or the Department of Defense? **Nope -- just Tweeted.** Trump sent a company's stocks spiraling downwards, causing millions of dollars in lost revenue. Did he consult with his economic advisors or the Department of the Treasury? **Nope -- just Tweeted.** Trump insulted China and North Korea in what is one of the most dangerous geopolitical hotspots on the planet. Did he consult with his national security advisors or the State Department? **Nope -- just Tweeted.** Trump is the Commander-in-Chief. He needs to focus on his job instead of unleashing disorder and chaos because he can't put down his phone. [_**Call on Trump to delete his Twitter account and save us all the trouble.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e23/622b7b5b/4e9d4fa/307bde2a/683775593/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e170806") You can also tweet @realDonaldTrump with the hashtag #DeleteYourAccount. This whole Tweeter-in-Chief bit Trump's pulling has to stop. He's not on a reality TV show anymore. He's the president. It's time he started acting like it. Debbie |
Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e23/622b7b5b/4e9d4fa/307bde2d/683775593/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe
---
clean_body: | | | | | Historians are going to have a field day going through President Trump's Twitter archive. Unfortunately for us, his Tweets have real-time impacts and consequences. Trump tried to ban transgender individuals from serving in the military, 140 characters at a time. Did he consult with his military advisors or the Department of Defense? Nope -- just Tweeted. Trump sent a company's stocks spiraling downwards, causing millions of dollars in lost revenue. Did he consult with his economic advisors or the Department of the Treasury? Nope -- just Tweeted. Trump insulted China and North Korea in what is one of the most dangerous geopolitical hotspots on the planet. Did he consult with his national security advisors or the State Department? Nope -- just Tweeted. Trump is the Commander-in-Chief. He needs to focus on his job instead of unleashing disorder and chaos because he can't put down his phone. "" You can also tweet @realDonaldTrump with the hashtag #DeleteYourAccount. This whole Tweeter-in-Chief bit Trump's pulling has to stop. He's not on a reality TV show anymore. He's the president. It's time he started acting like it. Debbie | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com "" to unsubscribe

name: Democrats.org
subject: Pence 2020? (add your name)
body:
Pence is asking millionaires to donate to his personal PAC for a possible 2020 run.
---
**Add your name if you're committed to making sure Mike Pence never becomes president.

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stop-Mike-Pence1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170808_dnc_nd&source=em_20170808_dnc_nd")**

Derek --

The rumor mill is abuzz with stories about Mike Pence possibly running for president in 2020. He's been holding big fundraisers around the country, asking millionaire donors to make checks out to his personal PAC.

It's hard to blame Pence for thinking Donald Trump will be a one-term (at most) president. **[But if Pence thinks he can waltz into the White House in three years, he's got another thing coming.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stop-Mike-Pence1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+But+if+Pence+thinks+he+can+waltz+into+th&utm_campaign=em_20170808_dnc_nd&source=em_20170808_dnc_nd")**

Mike Pence has been Donald Trump's go-to guy for the past eight months. When Trump needed votes for health care repeal, Pence went to the Senate floor to personally lobby the three Republican senators who voted against it. When Trump needed someone to push his biggest lie -- that millions of people voted illegally last year -- Pence gleefully stepped up to the plate to run Trump's sham "voter fraud" commission.

Pence hasn't kept his nose clean when it comes to Trump's scandals either. He praised Trump's decision to fire former FBI director James Comey, who was investigating their campaign's potential collusion with Russia.

**Mike Pence is Donald Trump without the hair (or the Twitter followers). Make sure he knows that if he tries to run for president, we'll be there to stop him:**

**[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stop-Mike-Pence1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170808_dnc_nd&source=em_20170808_dnc_nd")**
Thanks,

The Democrats

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405230e6/4067b0a/33a903386/7e6c87dd/3626575818/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170808_dnc_nd&source=em_20170808_dnc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405230e6/4067b0a/33a903386/7e6c87da/3626575818/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170808_dnc_nd&source=em_20170808_dnc_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405230e6/4067b0a/33a903386/7e6c87db/3626575818/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170808_dnc_nd&source=em_20170808_dnc_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405230e6/4067b0a/33a903386/7e6c87d8/3626575818/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170808_dnc_nd&source=em_20170808_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Team Maggie for Women Project
subject: role models
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fded4/2a380d31/1e7c316d/fe58ee/957315132/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fded4/2a380d31/1e7c316d/fe58ee/957315132/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hello,
We wanted to make sure that you didn't miss this [**_Elle_ piece**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fded4/2a380d31/1e7c316d/fe58ef/957315132/VEsF/ "http://www.elle.com/culture/career-politics/news/a47128/maggie-hassan-interview-americans-with-disabilities/") from last week:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fded4/2a380d31/1e7c316d/fe58ef/957315132/VEsC/ "http://www.elle.com/culture/career-politics/news/a47128/maggie-hassan-interview-americans-with-disabilities/")
In it, Senator Hassan discusses why she first ran for office, the need for more women in leadership, and the tangible impact role models have on our kids.
**Role models are important because they help us see what we can become, and we need more of them for young women and girls across the country.**
You see, right now, women hold just 21 seats in the United States Senate. And in 2018, 10 Democratic women are up for reelection.
That's why we're asking you to [**take five minutes and read this piece from _Elle_ ,**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fded4/2a380d31/1e7c316d/fe58ef/957315132/VEsD/ "http://www.elle.com/culture/career-politics/news/a47128/maggie-hassan-interview-americans-with-disabilities/") and then [**consider making a grassroots donation**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fded4/2a380d31/1e7c316d/fe58e8/957315132/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxN19kZW13b21lbi1yZWVsZWN0IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxNzA4MDhfcm9sZW1vZGVsc19hY3QiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2017_demwomen-reelect?refcode=e20170808_rolemodels_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500") split between the Senate Democratic women role models up for reelection in 2018.
We hope you're feeling inspired and that you enjoy reading as much as we did!
-- All of us on Team Maggie

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fded4/2a380d31/1e7c316d/fe58e8/957315132/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxN19kZW13b21lbi1yZWVsZWN0IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxNzA4MDhfcm9sZW1vZGVsc19hY3QiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2017_demwomen-reelect?refcode=e20170808_rolemodels_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fded4/2a380d31/1e7c316d/fe58e9/957315132/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

**

**

[ ](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fded4/2a380d31/1e7c316d/fe58ea/957315132/VEsP/ "https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/2.0/legalcode")

Role models are important because they help us see what we can become, and we need more of them for young women and girls across the country. You see, right now, women hold just 21 seats in the United States Senate. And in 2018, 10 Democratic women are up for reelection. name: Team Ryan
subject: Border security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc
body:
Friend --

Threats to national security attack our American way of life.

Our government's first and most important duty is to defend the homeland. Which is why your House Republicans took the first step in securing the border -- **they voted to fully fund President Trump 's request to build the wall.**

Not only are we building the wall, but we're also rebuilding our military and supporting our troops with the largest pay increase in 8 years.

**Will you show your support for protecting the border?**
**
[Protect our border now >>](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MzAwOTk3OTgS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEwMDk0NjU2OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

We need you with us, Friend.

[**Protect our border now >>**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MzAwOTk3OTgS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEwMDk0NjU2OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Thank you,

Team Ryan

| [Protect our Border ](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MzAwOTk3OTgS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEwMDk0NjU2OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
